productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Black Laptop Bag
description: Black laptop bag with two short handles and a detachable and adjustable strap for carrying ease Two external zipped pockets with branding on the front and an organiser sleeve inside the second pocket One main padded zipped compartment with a padded laptop sleeve with velcro closure and two zipped pockets inside One zipped compartment at the back One external slip pocket at the back with velcro closure and a zipper at the bottom Rubber brand tabs at the bottom Warranty: 2 years international warranty
